Reinvent your business with AI systems that adapt and improve.

Capabilities

A full engineering and design surface, wired for AI.

Five interlocking practices. Engage one, or hand us the whole problem.

Development

Production-grade web, mobile, and platform engineering. Sketch to scale, with the same team across the whole arc.

Internal tools and workflows that pay for themselves. Lead-gen, ops, support, billing, every flow that drains a Tuesday.

Modernize legacy stacks without halting the business. Strategy, migrations, data, operations, change management.

Warehouses, lakehouses, and the pipelines that feed AI in production. Observability built in, not bolted on.

Industries

Empowering diverse business ecosystems.

Intelligent solutions tailored for specific industry challenges.

Explore all →

Healthcare insights

Modernize care delivery for providers, telemedicine platforms, and medical software teams. AI automation, intelligent records, and patient-grade reliability.

100% HIPAA & GDPR-compliant 2× faster patient onboarding
Pain points we solve

What slows clinical teams down.

Admin overhead steals clinical hours

Charting, scheduling, and billing eat the day before a single patient is seen.

Patient data scattered across systems

EMR, scheduling, and lab portals never talk; nurses become integration code.

24/7 support without staffing the night shift

Patient inquiries hit at 2am; phone trees are a liability, not a service.

Talk to a healthcare specialist.

A 30-minute scoping call, NDA-first, with the engineer who would lead delivery.

Book intro call
Why teams choose us

Four reasons the engagement keeps compounding.

Pick a pillar to see the shape of how we work.

Senior-led delivery at every stage

Expert Team.

Our team isn't junior devs learning on your dime. Every project is led by senior engineers and designers with 8+ years across fintech, SaaS, healthcare, and e-commerce.

8+
Avg. years experience

Selected work

Outcomes, not artifacts.

LinkedGolf · Hero shot
[ booking-sdk_v4.figma ]
MarketplaceiOS+191

LinkedGolf

Challenge Tee-time inventory fragmented across 1,200+ operators.
Solution Unified marketplace plus a booking SDK with realtime supply sync.
Outcome +312% bookings · 4.8★ App Store · 11s avg checkout
Read the case study →
Dashboard.Earth · Hero shot
[ lakehouse_explorer.png ]
ClimateAnalytics+27

Dashboard.Earth

Challenge Climate teams stitching 40+ data sources by hand.
Solution Lakehouse plus an LLM-driven exploration UI on top of curated sets.
Outcome -87% time-to-insight · adopted by 14 NGOs
Read the case study →
Capsule Lab · Hero shot
[ longitudinal_viewer.mp4 ]
HealthtechWeb+52

Capsule Lab

Challenge Lab results delivered as static PDFs, low patient engagement.
Solution Interactive longitudinal viewer with AI explanations.
Outcome 4.2× weekly active · NPS +38
Read the case study →
How we work

Three ways to engage. One bar for quality.

01 · Fixed scope

Fixed Scope

Defined deliverables, milestone billing. Predictable from day one.

Best for Well-scoped MVPs and rebuilds with clear acceptance criteria.
Most popular
02 · Time & materials

Time & Materials

Weekly sprints, billed against effort. Steerable as scope evolves.

Best for Evolving scope, R&D, and most AI work where the spec is a moving target.
03 · Retainer

Retainer

Embedded squad, predictable monthly spend. Roadmap-owning team.

Best for Long-term roadmap ownership across multiple workstreams.
Start the conversation

Have an idea worth building?
Let's pressure-test it.

A 30-minute call with a senior engineer. No deck, no pitch. We'll sketch the system on the call.

Or email hello@techtiz.co

An AI-native engineering studio building adaptive systems for ambitious teams.
